response.justification: Candidate exceeds the 6+ years experience bar with 15+ years across full-stack roles, and has direct hands-on experience with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) plus current AI-agent/MCP work at re:cinq that maps cleanly to the AI agent requirement. Background is heavy on backend craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based dev) and spans multiple languages and databases, though Nest.js, Kotlin, and Vitest are not explicitly listed.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack across TypeScript/Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, and Docker
Active AI-agent and MCP code-generator work at current role aligns with AI agent requirement
Strong engineering craft: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus workshop/teaching track record
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or Kotlin/Java in recent roles (Java only in early/robotics work)
Heavy investment in D-lang ecosystem may signal preference outside the team's primary stack
Bachelor's from IIT Bombay listed remotely while working in Europe is unusual and worth verifying
